description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs.American Tourister is proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion.Height: 46 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 16 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment, with an elasticated pocket and a smaller pocketOne zipped compartment on the front with organiser pouches One elasticated pocket on the left side and a zipped pocket on the right side for enhanced spacePadded haul loop for easy carryingTwo adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the bottom for breathable comfortBranded zips and branding appliqué d on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfort and rubber legs at the baseCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
